welcome_badge_text: ✨ Free for families · No credit card needed
welcome_hero_subheadline:
Shared todos, chores, calendars, shopping lists, and recipes — all in one place for the whole family.
Less chaos. More together time.
welcome_hero_social_proof: Join thousands of families already using Flowki · No credit card required
welcome_features_subheadline: Flowki brings the whole family together in a single, beautifully simple app.
welcome_cta_headline: Ready to bring your family together?
welcome_cta_subheadline: Set up Flowki for your family in under two minutes — completely free. No credit card, no commitment.
welcome_cta_signin_link: Already have an account? Sign in →

welcome_features_json.name: Shared Todos
welcome_features_json.description: Assign tasks to family members with due dates. Everyone stays accountable.

welcome_features_json.name: Chores Roster
welcome_features_json.description: Recurring chores with automatic rotation. No more arguments about whose turn it is.

welcome_features_json.name: Family Calendar
welcome_features_json.description: One shared calendar for everyone. Syncs with Google Calendar too.

welcome_features_json.name: Shopping Lists
welcome_features_json.description: Real-time shared lists. Tick items off as you shop — everyone sees instantly.

welcome_features_json.name: Recipes
welcome_features_json.description: Save family favourites and plan meals together. Ingredients go straight to shopping.

welcome_features_json.name: AI Assistant
welcome_features_json.description: Ask your family assistant anything — schedules, reminders, or what's for dinner.

welcome_steps_json.title: Create your family
welcome_steps_json.body: Sign up in 30 seconds. Name your family group and set a colour scheme.

welcome_steps_json.title: Invite everyone
welcome_steps_json.body: Send a magic-link invite. Family members join with one tap — no setup required.

welcome_steps_json.title: Organise together
welcome_steps_json.body: Assign tasks, plan the week, shop smarter. Life gets calmer immediately.

welcome_benefits_json.title: Instant sync
welcome_benefits_json.description: Changes appear for every family member in real time.

welcome_benefits_json.title: Works everywhere
welcome_benefits_json.description: Install on your home screen. Works offline when signal drops.

welcome_benefits_json.title: Smart notifications
welcome_benefits_json.description: Get reminded at the right time. No app required — push works on mobile browsers.

welcome_benefits_json.title: Private & secure
welcome_benefits_json.description: Your family data is yours. No ads, no tracking, no selling your data.
